message:
fix(kafka): document producer-per-call bug behind feature gate

- kafka.rs: annotated MEDIUM bug where send() and flush_inner() each
  create a new ThreadedProducer per call (drops before delivery, flush
  is always no-op). Requires storing producer as struct field when kafka
  feature is enabled. Bug is latent — kafka feature not currently active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
